snippet.title: Singapore CNY tragedy: Five die after car slams into shophouse, fire breaks out
snippet.description:
Five people died and one was injured after a BMW slammed into the front of a shophouse before bursting into flames at Tanjong Pagar Road in Singapore Saturday (Feb 13) morning.
 
Preliminary investigations revealed the car was driven by a 29-year-old man with four male passengers, in their 20s.

Read more at https://bit.ly/3tTInF8

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman’s (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

snippet.title: Singapore Budget 2021: Finance Minister Heng Swee Keat speaks in Parliament on Feb 16
snippet.description:
DPM and Finance Minister Heng Swee Keat announced a Household Support Package in during Budget 2021 on Tuesday (Feb 16), an S$11-billion COVID-19 resilience package and a hike in petrol duty rates. He also said an impending GST hike will take place between 2022 and 2025.

snippet.title: Chinese New Year’s decorations, goods and snacks！明日除夕，挂灯笼、贴对联、备好年货过大年啦！丨Liziqi Channel
snippet.description:
Please  subscribe to 【李子柒 Liziqi 】Liziqi Channel on YouTube if you like my videos: https://goo.gl/nkjpSx 
#李子柒#Liziqi#lýtửthấ#ChineseCuisine #ChineseFood

Tomorrow is Chinese New Year’s Eve! 
We put up lanterns, paste Spring Festival couplets, and do shopping and stock up for the new year!
Another year is dawning!
Chinese New Year’s decorations, goods and snacks are ready for the big day.
Melon seeds, peanuts, candied haws, Sanzi (fried dough twists), and fried prawn crackers, to name a few.
A big hug for those who can’t get together with their families back in the hometown.
I’m convinced that infinite hope and luck
are sure to come in 2021!
一年又到头啦！
年俗、年货小零食做起来准备过大年喽～
瓜子 花生 糖葫芦、馓子 虾片走起来！
给所有没回家就地过年的小伙伴们大大的拥抱
我相信，生生不息的希望和好运
一定会和2021一起到来


 【李子柒 Liziqi 】 https://goo.gl/nkjpSx

Official “34+35 Remix” Lyrics:

Hmm 
You might think I'm crazy 
The way I've been cravin'
If I put it quite plainly
Just gimme them babies 

So, what you doing tonight?
Better say, "doin' you right" (yeah)
Watchin' movies, but we ain't seen a thing tonight (yeah)

I don't wanna keep you up (you up)
But show me, can you keep it up? (It up)
'Cause then I'll have to keep you up
Shit, maybe I'ma keep you up, boy 

I've been drinking coffee (I've been drinking coffee)
And I've been eating healthy (and I've been eating healthy)
Know I keep it squeaky, yeah (know I keep it squeaky)
Saving up my energy (yeah, yeah, saving up my energy) 

Can you stay up all night?

snippet.title: Eric周興哲《如果能幸福 Fortunate》Official MV - HBO Asia 原創影集《戒指流浪記》片尾曲
snippet.description:
🎧 Stream/Download here : https://eric.lnk.to/Fortunate
🔔 Subscribe To My YouTube Channel : https://sonymusic.pse.is/ericyoutube

人生是由無數的選擇堆砌而成，
所有選擇之後都有個 ”如果”
如果…我能更勇敢一點？
如果…我能說出口？
如果…我能不放棄？
所有的抉擇伴隨著遺憾刻成未來的地圖，
而目的地，是不是幸福？

HBO Asia 原創影集《戒指流浪記》片尾曲
周興哲《如果能幸福》


・Song Lyrics・

詞：Eric周興哲／吳易緯
曲：Eric周興哲

有時候  想往前走
卻又  忍耐不住  頻頻回頭
奔跑在風和日麗  突然間  有狂風暴雨
等待下個雨過天晴

有時候  我會經過
以前  似曾相識  相遇街口
捧在  手心裡的夢  再努力握不住以後
我們才會害怕給承諾

如果  幸福  能像  戒指  能戴在手上
至少下一次  逞強  受傷  能夠  少點迷惘
如果  幸福  需要  走過  必經的掙扎
我一個人  必然堅強  不怕流浪

如果  眼淚  能像  戒指  能反射微光
閃耀每一刻  過去  現在  未來  不再躲藏
如果  幸福  真的  為我  等待在前方
就不害怕  問你  這句話

「你愛我嗎」

有時候  想往回走
回去  回不去的  回憶盡頭
當時  曾對自己說  「如果能幸福就好了」
為什麼現在不敢擁有

有時候  你會笑我
討厭寂寞  卻不敢  先愛再說
如果  能幸福  誰會放棄  寧願擦身而過
不要我們是這種結果

如果  幸福  能像  戒指  能戴在手上
至少下一次  逞強  受傷  能夠  少點迷惘
如果  幸福  需要  走過  必經的掙扎
我一個人  必然堅強  不怕流浪

如果  眼淚  能像  戒指  能反射微光
閃耀每一刻  過去  現在  未來  不再躲藏
如果  幸福  真的  為我  等待在前方
就不害怕  親口  回答  這句話

「我愛你啊」


・Song Credit・

詞 Lyricist：Eric周興哲 Eric Chou／吳易緯 I-Wei Wu
曲 Composer：Eric周興哲 Eric Chou

製作人 Producer：馬敬恆 T-Ma／Eric周興哲 Eric Chou
編曲 Music Arranger：馬敬恆 T-Ma

和聲編寫 Backing Vocals Arrangement：Eric周興哲 Eric Chou
和聲 Backing Vocals：Eric周興哲 Eric Chou

配唱錄音工程師 Vocal Recording Engineer：Eric周興哲 Eric Chou
配唱錄音室 Vocal Recording Studio：Echou Productions

弦樂編寫 String Arrangement：馬敬恆 T-Ma
弦樂 Strings：靳海音弦樂團 Jin Hai Yin String Orchestra
弦樂錄音室：Tweak Tone Labs

混音工程師 Mixing Engineer：Brian Paturalski
混音錄音室 Mixing Studio：Dance Party Studio
母帶後期處理工程師 Mastering Engineer：Randy Merrill
母帶後期處理錄音室 Mastering Studio：Sterling Sound

OP：星空飛騰國際娛樂股份有限公司／植光土壤音創 Light 2 Run Music Creation
SP：Universal Ms Publ Ltd Taiwan

snippet.title: 2021 Spring Festival Gala: Wushu – A revered part of Chinese culture
snippet.description:
For  more:
https://www.cgtn.com/video

Led by renowned wushu artists Donnie Yen and Wu Jing, "Wushu Performance: Heroes of Heaven And Earth" wowed this year's gala audience by placing a natural landscape as the background of the performance through augmented reality (AR) technology.

Wushu is a revered part of Chinese culture with many styles of wushu listed as national intangible cultural heritage. Last year, Taijiquan, a form of wushu, was listed as a UNESCO intangible cultural heritage.
#SpringFestival2021 #SpringFestivalGala

snippet.title: 《中央广播电视总台2021年春节联欢晚会》 1/4 | CCTV春晚
snippet.description:
本期节目主要内容：
01:00 开场歌舞《万事如意》 演唱：佟丽娅 陈伟霆（中国香港） 江疏影 杜江 欧阳娜娜（中国台湾） 龙紫岚（中国澳门）；
08:03 歌舞《节日》
08:43（1）《非洲歌舞》 领唱：朱明瑛；演唱：谢一梅 牛妞 李丁 王呈章；领舞：刘洋 王晶
09:35（2）《埃及藤杖舞与东方舞》 领唱：沈娅丽 霍思羽 西尔艾力；领舞：刘婕
10:49（3）《西班牙响板舞与阿根廷探戈》 领唱：洪之光 葛晓璐；领舞：王梓丁
12:21（4）《俄罗斯民俗舞》领舞：张翰
13:09（5）《中国红绸舞》领舞：殷硕 曾明；表演：中国东方演艺集团
14:46 相声《年三十的歌》 表演：岳云鹏 孙越；
29:37 创意表演《牛起来》 演唱：刘德华（中国香港） 关晓彤 王一博；
35:14 武术《天地英雄》 主演：甄子丹（中国香港） 吴京；
42:00 小品《一波三折》 演员：贾玲 张小斐 许君聪 ト钰 泰维 刘宏禄 孙集斌；
59:27 歌曲《奔跑的青春》 演唱：迪丽热巴 李现 刘浩存 陈立农（中国台湾） 无限少女 时代少年团；
01:03:38 特别节目《向祖国报告》 讲述人：任鲁豫 嘉宾：杨孟飞 张柏楠 谢军 孙泽洲 “2020全国脱贫攻坚奖”获奖个人及组织代表；
01:10:26 歌曲《追梦之路》 演唱：韩红；
01:14:22 舞蹈《茉莉》 领舞：孟庆旸。

snippet.title: Chelsea 2-0 Newcastle | Werner Bags Goal & Assist In Win! | Highlights
snippet.description:
Timo Werner scored and assisted in Chelsea's win at home to Newcastle. 

Download Chelsea FC's official mobile app:
-App Store https://apple.co/2vvlN9t
-Play Store http://bit.ly/2MfNJHX 

Subscribe: http://che.lc/YTsubscribe

Welcome to the official home of Chelsea Football Club on YouTube. It’s the only channel where you’ll get an authentic look at life at this great club. Every week we’ll be uploading fresh content from the training ground, our famous stadium and much, much more. Nowhere else will you get closer to world-class stars like Christian Pulisic, Kai Havertz, Hakim Ziyech, Timo Werner, N’Golo Kanté, Sam Kerr, Fran Kirby & Pernille Harder.

ABOUT CHELSEA FOOTBALL CLUB
Founded in 1905, Chelsea Football Club has a rich history, with its many successes including 5 Premier League titles, 8 FA Cups and 1 Champions League, secured on a memorable night in 2012. Famous former Blues include Peter Osgood, Gianfranco Zola, Frank Lampard, John Terry, Didier Drogba & Eden Hazard.

snippet.title: Can You Be Single And Happy? | Real Talk Season 2 Episode 16
snippet.description:
For most people, finding their life-long partner is the ultimate goal but does that mean that we can't be happy if haven't found ours?

Valentine's Day is coming but instead of talking about love, love, love, the cast discusses about their single lives and their thoughts about being ready for a relationship.

Subscribe for more content like this: http://bit.ly/SubscribeMOSG

snippet.description:

snippet.title: CHAKRA - Tamil Sneak Peek | Vishal | Shraddha Srinath | Yuvan Shankar Raja | VFF
snippet.description:
Presenting the Tamil Sneak Peek  of CHAKRA; starring Vishal; Directed by M.S. Anandan; Music Composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

Vishal starrer "Chakra" is an action-thriller movie releasing on 19th February.

MS Anandan's debut film stars Vishal, Shraddha Srinath and Regina Cassandra. 'Chakra' talks about cybercrime and online scams. 

Vishal, as Chandru, is an officer who is on a mission to expose this evil act.

Here's a Tamil sneak peek on the VFF channel that you shouldn't miss! Subscribe to Vishal Film Factory for more updates. 

Chakra movie is coming soon!

Checkout The Trailer in Other Languages👇

snippet.title: 黃明志牛年賀歲歌曲【我是一隻牛】Ft. 心音合唱團 @2021
snippet.description:
Every year I make a “Animal” song for Chinese New Year. It’s the turn of the COW...
Happy 牛 Year，牛年新年歌來了！
那隻雞拜年☞狗一樣☞豬你發大財☞過節老鼠☞我是一隻牛... 
你們知道的，我的新年歌沒有一首正常的... 請不要抱著喜氣洋洋咚咚鏘的錯誤心態來打開這首歌，謝謝慢用。

Thx crew, musician & partner！

snippet.title: CHUNG HA 청하 'Bicycle' MV
snippet.description:
CHUNG HA 청하 'Bicycle' MV

Stream/ Download 'Bicycle' : https://ffm.to/chungha_bicycle
Subscribe CHUNG HA : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9Gxb0gMCh3EPIDLQXeQUog

CHUNG HA The 1st Studio Album [ Querencia ] 'Bicycle'

With the strong fuzz guitar intro this song expresses the excitement and overwhelming energy of going forward by stepping on the pedal with R&B pop-trap sounds.
The straightforward lyrics in the chorus that lead to “Get out of my way-ah! / I’ll show you how I like it” and the unhindered attitude stamps a seal on her irreplaceable presence as an independent and energetic solo artist. 

강렬한 퍼즈 기타의 도입부와 함께 전개되는 R&B 팝-트랩 사운드와 함께 페달을 밟아 앞으로 나아가는 순간의 설렘과 벅찬 에너지를 표현해낸 곡. “Get out of my way-ah! / 보여줄게 how I like it”로 이어지는 코러스 파트의 직선적인 가사와 거침없는 애티튜드는 독립적이고도 에너지 넘치는 솔로 아티스트로서의 자신감과 그 누구도 대체할 수 없는 존재감을 각인시킨다.


[ CHUNG HA 'Bicycle' Credits ]

Lyrics by VINCENZO, CHUNG HA
Composed by Daniel Kim, Jeremy G (Future Sound), Dawn Elektra
Arranged by Daniel Kim, VINCENZO

Synthesizer Performed by Daniel Kim, VINCENZO
Bass Performed by Daniel Kim, VINCENZO
Guitar Performed by Daniel Kim, VINCENZO
Drum Performed by Daniel Kim, VINCENZO
Background Vocals by Emily Yeonseo Kim, Dawn Elektra
Vocal Directed by Fuxxy, VINCENZO

Recording Engineer Jung Eunkyeng at Ingrid Studio
Mixing Engineer  Yoon Wonkwon at Studio DDeepKick
Mastering Engineer Park Jung-Un at Honey Butter Studio

snippet.title: Alex Pandian | New Releases Tamil Movie | Eng Subtitle | Karthi, Anushka Shetty, Santhanam | Full HD
snippet.description:
Subscribe Channel  :-  https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC1iUOD94krWyibcvoxDnqFA?sub_confirmation=1

The film's hare-brained plot involves a petty criminal Alex Pandian who abducts the Chief Minister's daughter for a coterie of bad men consisting of an NRI businessman who wants to import some banned antibiotics from US, a rich doctor (Suman), a Godman, the Chief Secretary and City Police Commissioner! How our hero as a one-man-army thwarts the operation is the story.

Alex, a small-time thief, gets a contract to kidnap the chief minister's daughter, Divya, for three days. But when Divya reveals to him the real reason for her kidnap, he decides to help her.

Cast
Karthi as Alex Pandian
Anushka Shetty as Divya
Santhanam as Kaalayan
Milind Soman as Alvin Martin
Suman as Dr. GKM
Visu as Chief Minister
Prathap Pothen as Radhakrishnan (C.M Secretary)
Mahadevan as Swamiji
Nikita Thukral as Gayathri as Kaalyan's Elder Sister
Sanusha as Sneha Kaalyan's last Sister's
Akanksha Puri as Kaalyan's Sister
Manobala as Captain Divakaran
Saravanan as Parthiban
Renuka as Rani
Vaiyapuri as Nandu
Lollu Sabha Manohar as Saani Urundai
Nedumudi Venu as Anuya 's Father
Reenu Mathews as Anuya
Santhana Bharathi
Rajkapoor
Aryan
Vichu Vishwanath

snippet.title: 'I’m not a cat': lawyer gets stuck on Zoom kitten filter during court case
snippet.description:
A lawyer showed up to virtual court in the 394th district of Texas with a kitten filter turned on, the cat moving its lips and eyes, as Rod Ponton said he and his assistant were attempting to remove the filter during the court case.

The judge later posted the snipped and wrote: 'If a child used your computer before you join a virtual hearing, check the Zoom video options to be sure filters are off. This kitten just made a formal announcement on a case in the 394th.'

snippet.title: Bhoy | New Natok 2021 | Mosharraf Karim, Nadia, Shamim Zaman | Bangla New Natok | Bangladeshi Drama
snippet.description:
Bhoy Natok starring Mosharraf Karim & Sallha Khanam Nadia in lead roles, directed by Shamim Zaman.

New Natok 2021 - Bhoy (ভয়) - Natok New 2021
[A Eagle Music Original Drama]

Story, Screenplay & Direction by Shamim Zaman
Chief Assistant Director: Osman Auvi
Cinematographer: Sumon Hossain

Cast: Mosharraf Karim, Sallha Khanam Nadia, Shamim Zaman, Masum Basher, Mili Basher, Sabrina Tonni, and Monisha Sikder

Voy Natok/ Voy Bangla Natok Co-Cast: Forgan Milton, Ratul, Shokhorio Mondal, Asraful Islam Raju, Rabbi Hossain Ujjal, J.K Shapon, Heramony, Khaleda Akter Anny & Liza Akter

Edit & Color: Bappi
Background Score: Ankur Mahmud

Assistant Director: Nabiullah Mirza, Ahsan Habib, Khalid Hossain Khalid
Dop Assistant: Mustakin Al Hasan
Camera Assistant: Chandan Roy, Tanvir Rio, Bonny Mahmud

Song: Konna Tomar Hridoy Parate
Singer: AH Turjo
Lyrics & Tune: Salman Ahmed Suhag
Music: AH Turjo

লাইটঃ ইউনুছ সানাই, তোসিকুল ইসলাম, তারেক, লিমন
ট্রলিঃ হাতেম
মেকাপ শিল্পীঃ মো. রিমান
মেকাপ সহকারীঃ মো. সুজন
ব্যবস্থাপনাঃ শাহীন সিনান, রুবেল, তরিকুল, মন্ডল
হাউজঃ জে.কে শ্যুটিং হাউজ
খাবার সরবরাহঃ আবুল খায়ের
গাড়ি সরবরাহঃ আলতাফ, কামরুল
জেনারেটরঃ সজল
লোকেশনঃ মানিকগঞ্জ

Produced By: Kachi Ahmed

snippet.title: Everton 0-2 Fulham | Premier League Highlights | Josh Maja at the double on Merseyside
snippet.description:
Watch the key moments from Goodison Park as Fulham faced Everton on Valentine's Day in the Premier League looking to secure their first league win at the ground.

Enjoy match highlights, player reactions, training and behind the scenes to get closer to the likes of Aleksandar Mitrović, Alphonse Areola, Ruben Loftus-Cheek, Kenny Tete, Antonee Robinson, Frank Anguissa and many more.

Subscribe to the Official Fulham YouTube Channel: http://ow.ly/e7Li30rhHTM
Follow us on Facebook: http://ow.ly/1lGs30rhHUk
Follow us on Twitter: http://ow.ly/dJIA30rhHUN
Follow us on Instagram: http://ow.ly/fowC30rhHV2

Get our Official App: https://smarturl.it/fulhamfc-app 
 
This is the Official YouTube channel for Fulham Football Club. For more exclusive content, make sure you subscribe to FFCtv: http://ow.ly/sDa530rhHVA
 
Fulham Football Club is London's oldest professional football club, having been established in 1879.

snippet.title: Goodbye, Tanglin Halt: Bidding Farewell To Some Of Singapore's Oldest Flats | On The Red Dot
snippet.description:
One of Singapore’s oldest HDB estates, Tanglin Halt is fondly remembered for its iconic 10-storey flats that appeared on the nation’s first-ever $1 note, as well as the food stalls that still continue to dish out heritage hawker fare at the old wet market. But this year, everything is about to change. Tanglin Halt is undergoing the biggest redevelopment for public housing in Singapore – the Selective En bloc Redevelopment Scheme (SERS). History buff and food blogger Dr Leslie Tay takes a walk down memory lane, but as he soaks in the township’s old-world charm and meets the hawkers and residents of Tanglin Halt, he discovers a community whose bonds are deeply rooted in the coming of age of a nation.

===========
About On The Red Dot: CNA's weekly programme documents the stories of ordinary Singaporeans and celebrates their resilience, identity and sense of belonging.
===========

vi.title: Chuẩn bị sẵn một mâm cơm tất niên, làm một bàn “ thịt bò” đón năm mới!
vi.description:
※click chuột nhấn vào cc ở góc dưới bên phải màn hình, thì sẽ có bản sub tương ứng với ngôn ngữ của bạn xuất hiện rồi !

chúc cả nhà năm mới vui vẻ ~ lại là một năm tạm biệt tuổi cũ, ăn xong bữa cơm tất niên này, thì  được tính là chính thức bước sang một năm mới rồi! Cảm ơn xác bạn trong một năm qua đã đồng hành và ủng hộ, một năm mới, may mắn là bạn, hạnh phúc là bạn, mạnh khoẻ là bạn, phát tài là bạn, hi vọng đồng hành với tôi trong tương lai cũng là bạn ~

Chào các bạn! Tôi là Điền Tây tiểu ca, một cô gái  chính hiệu của tỉnh Vân Nam, nếu như các bạn thích video của tôi, có thể tiếp tục theo dõi trang của tôi, tôi sẽ chia sẻ cuộc sống của tôi ở các  trang,  và các món ăn đặc sắc của Vân Nam, chúc các bạn luôn luôn vui vẻ, ngày nào cũng có ẩm thực bầu bạn~

hi.title: नए साल की शाम डिनर की एक तालिका तैयार की गई, नए साल का स्वागत करने के लिए "बैल
hi.description:
※नीचे दाऐ कोना मेनू बार में सीसी बटन पर क्लिक करें, तो संबंधित भाषा में उपशीर्षक दिखाई होगी। 

सभी को नया साल मुबारक हो ~ पुराने को विदाई देने और नए का स्वागत करने के लिए एक और वर्ष आया है, इस नए साल की शाम डिनर के खाने के बाद तो आधिकारिक रूप से नया साल का प्रवेश किया गया है! पिछले साल के दौरान आपकी कंपनी और समर्थन के लिए आप सभी का धन्यवाद देती हूं। नए साल में, शुभकामनाएं आप हैं, खुशी आप हैं, स्वास्थ्य आप हैं, धन आप हैं, और आशा है कि भविष्य में मेरे साथ भी आप रहेंगे ~

सभी को नमस्कार, मैं दिअन षि षीओग, युन्नान की एक असली छोटी बहन। अगर आपको मेरा वीडियो पसंद है तो मेरे चैनल को देखना जारी रखें। मैं विभिन्न प्लेटफार्मों पर अपने जीवन और युन्नान विशिष्टताओं को साझा करूं, मुझे ख्वाइश है कि आप हर दिन खुश रहें स्वादिष्ट भोजन के साथ ~

ko.title: 연야반(年夜饭)을 한 상 차리고, “소 한상”을 차려서 설을 맞이합시다！
ko.description:
※우측 상단 메뉴의 cc버튼을 클릭하시면 원하시는 언어의 자막이 나옵니다!

여러분 새해 복 많이 받으세요~ 또다시 한 해를 떠나보냈네요. 이번 연야반(年夜饭: 섣달 그믐날에 온 가족이 모여 먹는 식사)을 다 먹고 나면, 이제 새로운 한 해가 시작됩니다! 지난 한 해 여러분이 함께해주시고 많은 응원을 해주셔서 감사합니다. 새로운 한 해에는 행운, 행복, 건강, 재복 모두 함께하시길 바라고, 앞으로도 저와 함께해주시길 바라겠습니다~ 

여러분 안녕하세요! 저는 전서소가(뎬시샤오꺼) 운남 본토 아가씨 입니다. 제 영상이 마음에 드신다면 계속해서 제 채널을 구독해주세요.
저는 몇가지 플랫폼에서 제 일상과 운남 특색 미식들을 공유하고있습니다. 여러분 좋은하루되시고 매일 맛있는 음식과 함께하시길 바라겠습니다~

id.title: Tahun Baru Imlek akan tiba lagi, aku membuat “Hidangan Sapi” menyambut Tahun Baru Imlek!
id.description:
※Tekan tombol pada menu di kanan bawah, maka akan muncul subtitle dengan bahasa yang sesuai!

Selamat Tahun Baru kepada semuanya. Lagi-lagi setahun dilewati. Setelah makan kenyang hidangan di malam Tahun Baru Imlek, maka sudah terhitung memasuki tahun yang baru! Terima kasih kalian dalam setahun ini selalu menemani dan mendukungku. Di tahun yang baru ini, semoga yang beruntung adalah kamu, yang berbahagia adalah kamu, yang sehat adalah kamu, yang menjadi kaya adalah kamu, semoga yang selalu menamaniku di kemudian hari juga kamu.

Halo semuanya. Aku adalah Dianxi Xiaoge, seorang gadis khas Yunnan. Jika kalian menyukai videoku, silakan terus ikuti saluranku ini. Aku akan berbagi kehidupanku dan makanan lezat khas Yunnan di platform yang berbeda. Semoga kalian setiap hari berbahagia, dan setiap hari selalu ditemani makanan lezat~

bn.title: নববর্ষের রাতের খাবার প্রস্তুত হয়ে গেছে，নতুন বছরকে স্বাগত জানাতে এক টেবিল "গরুর মাংসের" খাবার
bn.description:
※মেনু বারের নীচের ডানদিকে কোণার সিসি বোতামটি ক্লিক করুন এবং সংশ্লিষ্ট ভাষায় সাবটাইটেল উপস্থিত হবে!

সবাইকে নববর্ষের শুভেচ্ছা! আবারো পুরানো বছরকে বিদায় জানাতে হলো, এই নববর্ষের আগের রাতের খাবার খাওয়ার পরে, আমরা আনুষ্ঠানিকভাবে নতুন বছরে প্রবেশ করলাম, গত বছরে সঙ্গ এবং সমর্থন দেওয়ার জন্য আপনাদের ধন্যবাদ! নতুন এই বছর, আপনাদের জন্য বয়ে আনুক সুখ, সু-স্বাস্থ্য, সম্পদ এই শুভ কামনাই রইল এবং আমি আশা করি ভবিষ্যতেও আপনারা আমার সাথে থাকবেন ~

সবাইকে অভিবাদন! আমি ডায়ানজি জিয়াওজে, ইউনান প্রদেশের স্থানীয় এক মেয়ে, আপনি যদি আমার ভিডিও পছন্দ করেন তবে দয়া করে আমার চ্যানেলটি অনুসরণ করুন, আমি ইউনান্নে আমার জীবন এবং বিশেষ খাবারগুলি বিভিন্ন প্ল্যাটফর্মে শেয়ার করব, আমি আপনাকে প্রতিদিন সুখী করতে চাই এবং প্রতিদিন সুস্বাদু খাবার খাওয়া~

th.title: อาหารค่ำในวันรวมญาติ - ฉลองเทศกาลตรุษจีนด้วยอาหารแนว "วัว" - ต้อนรับ "ปีฉลู"!
th.description:
※คลิกปุ่ม "คำบรรยาย" ที่แถบเมนูด้านล่างขวาเพื่อเลือกแสดงซับไตเติ้ลภาษาไทย

สุขสันต์วันตรุษจีนค่ะ, เพื่อน ๆ ทุกคน ! 
ปีเก่ากำลังผ่านไป, ปีใหม่กำลังจะมาถึง
หลังจากอาหารในวันรวมญาติของค่ำคืนนี้
เราก็จะเข้าสู่ปีใหม่อย่างเป็นทางการ
ขอขอบคุณ,
สำหรับความรักและการสนับสนุนในปีที่ผ่านมาค่ะ
เนื่องในโอกาสปีใหม่ของจีนปีนี้
ขอให้ทุกท่านประสบโชคดี, มีความสุข, มีสุขภาพดี
และความมั่งคั่ง ด้วยค่ะ
 ~ หวังว่าเราจะอยู่ด้วยกันตลอดไปค่ะ ! ~

สวัสดีค่ะ เพื่อน ๆ ทุกคน !
ฉันคือเตียนซี เสี่ยวเกอ (Dianxi Xiaoge-滇西小哥)
เป็นสาวชาวพื้นเมืองจากมณฑลยูนนาน ประเทศจีน
หากคุณชื่นชอบวิดีโอนี้กรุณากด "ติดตาม" ช่องของฉันด้วยค่ะ
ฉันจะได้นำเสนอเรื่องราวของฉันและอาหารตามแบบฉบับของยูนนาน มาแบ่งปันต่อไป
ขอให้คุณมีความสุขและเพลิดเพลินกับอาหารอร่อยทุก ๆ วันด้วยค่ะ

snippet.title: MAN UNITED 3-3 EVERTON | PREMIER LEAGUE HIGHLIGHTS
snippet.description:
Dominic Calvert-Lewin rescued a late point for Everton at Old Trafford to make it seven away games without defeat. Carlo Ancelotti's side found themselves 2-0 down at half-time via goals from Edinson Cavani and Bruno Fernandes, but Abdoulaye Doucouré and James Rodriguez struck after the break. Scott McTominay thought he'd won it for Manchester United, until Calvert-Lewin steered home his 13th Premier League goal of the season in the 95th minute.

snippet.title: Bayern Munich v Tigres UANL | FIFA Club World Cup Qatar 2020 Final | Match Highlights
snippet.description:
Benjamin Pavard’s second-half goal proved the difference as UEFA Champions League winners Bayern Munich won the FIFA Club World Cup Qatar 2020 after a victory against Mexico’s Tigres UANL. FC Bayern’s world title triumph makes it a clean sweep of six trophies for the German giants, emulating the achievement of Barcelona in 2009/10.

snippet.title: G.E.M.鄧紫棋【平行世界 Parallel】MV （電影《刺殺小說家》主題曲)
snippet.description:
其實當初收到刺殺小說家的主題曲邀約時，因為時間非常少，少到不知道夠不夠時間創作及製作好歌曲、即使能寫完歌也不可能來得及報批進電影使用的那種程度，所以我本來以為得婉拒了。但是沒想到短短一個預告卻很打動我：這世上是否真的有平行世界？在這個時空錯過的東西，是否真的能在平行世界裡珍惜？

接下來在我看完電影預告後的五分鐘裡，平行世界的旋律就寫好了。緊接著我約了看片，看完片第二天歌詞也寫好了。

一切來的如此自然，是因為這個故事真的深深在觸動我。誰沒失去過？誰沒無奈過？誰沒怨恨過？但只要有一絲希望，你就會無論如何都仍然堅信著⋯有時候愛就是旁人看來很荒謬，你卻堅定不移；每個人都讓你放棄，你卻還在守侯。他們說愛讓人變得卑微嗎？你說愛讓人變得無比堅強；他們說是愛使人變得愚蠢嗎？你說是愛使人能面對一切的不可能。

因爲 ”我最後的信念，是若與你，再遇見⋯”

《平行世界》
作曲：G.E.M.鄧紫棋
作詞：G.E.M.鄧紫棋

失去你  我忘了天空曾經是  藍色
找不到你  我眼睛才在帽子下  躲著
不是愛上沉默  只是若你聽不見  何必呢
誰願到處漂泊  但你若不在  終點為何 

我最後的信念
是若與你  再遇見
在平行的世界
能否與你  再重寫

若與你  再遇見
能否與你  再重寫

從天而降的你  像一場流星雨  美麗
讓我措手不及  來不及許願就  失去你
玫瑰為什麼鮮紅  因為愛過的都痛
留守漆黑的夜空  我期盼著你的影蹤

我最後的信念
是若與你  再遇見
在平行的世界
能否與你  再重寫

若與你  再遇見
能否與你  再重寫

思念的夢魘  每天每夜  睜眼閉眼  都對我懲戒
但我努力對抗失望  不讓自己被吞滅

我最後的信念
是若與你  再遇見
在平行的世界
能否與你

我最後的信念
是若與你  再遇見
在平行的世界
能否與你  再重寫

最後的信念
就在那平行的世界


製作人：G.E.M.鄧紫棋 ，T-Ma 馬敬恆
編曲：G.E.M.鄧紫棋 ，T-Ma 馬敬恆 @ Blue Moon Studios，
混音： Richard Furch at the mixHaus studio, Los Angeles, Assisted by Domenic Tenaglia, 
母帶製作： Randy Merrill @ Sterling Sound 
錄音： 劉思宇 @ NEWBAND STUDIO

訂閱我的頻道!!! Subscribe to my channel !!!👇🏻👇🏻👇🏻
https://www.youtube.com/gem0816​ 
Instagram: @gem0816 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/G.E.M.Official​ 
Weibo: http://weibo.com/gemtang​ 

#鄧紫棋​ #平行世界​ #刺殺小說家

又#沈濤 擔任主持，#宋亞軒 擔任王牌少年！

snippet.title: 全家温馨翻唱1946-2020年新年串烧！重新改编版你绝对没听过！【我说新年好｜大团圆｜天天好天｜大日子｜恭喜恭喜｜贺新年｜恭喜发财｜春风吻上了我的脸｜惜福】
snippet.description:
今年的农历新年因为疫情的关系，将会是一个有史以来最不热闹的新年。许多人不能回家过年，不能和家人一起吃久违的团圆饭。而我们一家人很幸运，可以在一起在家简单地过年。我希望我们能够透过这首新年串烧，把我们满满的幸福感带给大家，尤其是不能回家的你们，希望这首歌能够陪伴你过年❤️

你们知不知道，我们翻唱的这些歌曲都是我们所有人新年时喜欢到爆的新年歌😍，有耳熟能详的《大团圆》、百听不厌的《天天好天》、年轻一代新年歌代表《我说新年好》等等。这次的串烧翻唱 是为了致敬所有大马好听的新年歌 因为每一次听到这些新年歌时 都会自然的开始期待新年🙌 希望大马人可以继续传承这份传统，也期待未来每年都会不断地听到更多好听的新年歌😍

此MV全程都是在家里自己拍摄的，也没有请任何摄影师和工作人员帮忙，音乐制作也是通过网络隔空进行沟通的。疫情期间，希望大家能乖乖呆在家过新年🙌

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------

［影片小制作 Video Small Small Production］

导演：BrysonLew刘铠翔
摄影：BrysonLew刘铠翔 | 脚架 | 爸爸 | 大姐
摄导：BrysonLew刘铠翔
灯光：BrysonLew刘铠翔
剪辑：BrysonLew刘铠翔
调色：BrysonLew刘铠翔
场景布置：BrysonLew刘铠翔 | 爸爸 | 妈妈 | 大姐 | 二姐
美术/手工：大姐
新年道具：在家里的储藏室的深处找到的
服装：在各自的衣橱找的
拍摄场地：很够力实用的客厅
本集干爹：A Yogurt Cow一只酸奶牛

［音乐制作 Music Production］

出品人：BrysonLew刘铠翔
制作人：Justin吴宗翰
编曲人：Justin吴宗翰
钢琴：Justin吴宗翰
吉他编写：Justin吴宗翰 | Han Yun陈翰融
吉他：Han Yun陈翰融
鼓编写：David Nooi黃起潤
鼓：David Nooi黃起潤
中音萨克斯管：嘉文
配唱制作：BrysonLew刘铠翔
录音：BrysonLew刘铠翔
混音师：道鹏.daw
母带后置处理：道鹏.daw
翻唱：BrysonLew刘铠翔 | 奶奶 | 爸爸 | 妈妈 | 大姐 | 二姐

翻唱歌曲：
1946《恭喜恭喜》姚敏、姚莉
1948《贺新年》张帆
1956《春风吻上我的脸》姚莉
1957《恭喜发财》葛兰
2008《大团圆》My Astro
2010《天天好天》My Astro
2013《大日子》My Astro
2013《惜福》My astro
2020《我说新年好》常勇 | Danny | 舒森 | 培永 | Julene | 常樂

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Moo～ 红遍全球、拥有1000家分店的 # 一只酸奶牛 来到马来西亚啦！我们秉持着使用天然、健康和新鲜的材料调配出的特调酸奶饮料，并且依照季节推出新款饮料，绝对让你新鲜感不断！全店酸奶饮料使用100%水果调配，食材经严格把关并且适合三大种族饮用。

除了基本款的招牌紫米系列，我们也有牛油果抹茶小帽、芒来芒趣酸奶多、浓浓榴莲酸奶多、蜜瓜酸奶摇和奥利奥酸奶紫米露，各种水果搭配酸奶一起喝，喝多了也没有罪恶感！

————————————
|| 分行资讯 ||

📍A Yogurt Cow - JB Sutera 
26, Jalan Sutera Tanjung 8/3, Taman Sutera Utama, 81300 Skudai, Johor

📍A Yogurt Cow - Sri Petaling
12, Jalan Radin Bagus 1, Sri Petaling, 57000 Kuala Lumpur.

📍Coming Soon!!

- Cheras
- Johor Jaya
- Sadakan

https://www.facebook.com/ayogurtcow.my
https://www.instagram.com/yogurtcow.my/

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
歌词

大团圆 大团圆 天天都是好天
这旅途 要珍惜彼此
La la la la... 

说一声恭喜贺新年 迎接美好的新一天
人人在门前贴春联yee进来 欢迎春降到人间爸进来 
兜一圈 又一年 春回到人间
看世间 每一天 
不停在转变
多少年 泛黄的那张贺 年片
一直留 在我记忆里面

抱一抱 笑一笑 
肩并肩欢呼 嘿! 新年好
要和和氣氣 哈哈嘻嘻
大家一起走下去

大团圆 大团圆 不管距离有多远 
这条路 只要有付出
走一步 每一步 不怕输

一天天 一年年
天天都是好天
好朋友 在身边 我们约定这一天

心若能放开一点 路就宽一些
财富和幸福之间 还有知足作界线
啦 啦 啦 啦

我說新年好 祝你今年好運到
你說新年好 祝我吉祥好預兆
快樂少不了 Happy 煩惱全忘掉
La La La La La La La La

大团圆 大团圆
不管距离有多远
好朋友 在身边 我们约定这一天

手牵着手一辈子     要惜福 珍惜你身边的人和物
他爱笑 你爱哭   有甜有苦才会有满足
 
PART 2
春风它吻上了我的脸
告诉我现在是春天
大团圆天天好天 
猪你有个大肥年
希望我钱包明年还 有钱

回首往事如烟　痛苦辛酸　寄望从今万事如愿

贺新年 祝新年 新年哪 年连年
爆竹声声催人想幼年
贺新年 祝新年 新年哪 年连年
岁月悠悠光阴如箭

咚 咚咚锵 咚 咚咚锵
咚 咚咚锵 咚锵咚锵

每条大街小巷   每个人的嘴里
见面第一句话   就是恭喜恭喜

恭喜恭喜恭喜你呀，恭喜恭喜恭喜你
恭喜恭喜恭喜你呀，恭喜恭喜恭喜你

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------

zh-Hans.title: 全家温馨翻唱1946-2020年新年串烧！重新改编版你绝对没听过！【我说新年好｜大团圆｜天天好天｜大日子｜恭喜恭喜｜贺新年｜恭喜发财｜春风吻上了我的脸｜惜福】
zh-Hans.description:
今年的农历新年因为疫情的关系，将会是一个有史以来最不热闹的新年。许多人不能回家过年，不能和家人一起吃久违的团圆饭。而我们一家人很幸运，可以在一起在家简单地过年。我希望我们能够透过这首新年串烧，把我们满满的幸福感带给大家，尤其是不能回家的你们，希望这首歌能够陪伴你过年❤️

你们知不知道，我们翻唱的这些歌曲都是我们所有人新年时喜欢到爆的新年歌😍，有耳熟能详的《大团圆》、百听不厌的《天天好天》、年轻一代新年歌代表《我说新年好》等等。这次的串烧翻唱 是为了致敬所有大马好听的新年歌 因为每一次听到这些新年歌时 都会自然的开始期待新年🙌 希望大马人可以继续传承这份传统，也期待未来每年都会不断地听到更多好听的新年歌😍

此MV全程都是在家里自己拍摄的，也没有请任何摄影师和工作人员帮忙，音乐制作也是通过网络隔空进行沟通的。疫情期间，希望大家能乖乖呆在家过新年🙌

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------

［影片小制作 Video Small Small Production］

导演：BrysonLew刘铠翔
摄影：BrysonLew刘铠翔 | 脚架 | 爸爸 | 大姐
摄导：BrysonLew刘铠翔
灯光：BrysonLew刘铠翔
剪辑：BrysonLew刘铠翔
调色：BrysonLew刘铠翔
场景布置：BrysonLew刘铠翔 | 爸爸 | 妈妈 | 大姐 | 二姐
美术/手工：大姐
新年道具：在家里的储藏室的深处找到的
服装：在各自的衣橱找的
拍摄场地：很够力实用的客厅
本集干爹：A Yogurt Cow一只酸奶牛

［音乐制作 Music Production］

出品人：BrysonLew刘铠翔
制作人：Justin吴宗翰
编曲人：Justin吴宗翰
钢琴：Justin吴宗翰
吉他编写：Justin吴宗翰 | Han Yun陈翰融
吉他：Han Yun陈翰融
鼓编写：David Nooi黃起潤
鼓：David Nooi黃起潤
中音萨克斯管：嘉文
配唱制作：BrysonLew刘铠翔
录音：BrysonLew刘铠翔
混音师：道鹏.daw
母带后置处理：道鹏.daw
翻唱：BrysonLew刘铠翔 | 奶奶 | 爸爸 | 妈妈 | 大姐 | 二姐

翻唱歌曲：
1946《恭喜恭喜》姚敏、姚莉
1948《贺新年》张帆
1956《春风吻上我的脸》姚莉
1957《恭喜发财》葛兰
2008《大团圆》My Astro
2010《天天好天》My Astro
2013《大日子》My Astro
2013《惜福》My astro
2020《我说新年好》常勇 | Danny | 舒森 | 培永 | Julene | 常樂

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Moo～ 红遍全球、拥有1000家分店的 # 一只酸奶牛 来到马来西亚啦！我们秉持着使用天然、健康和新鲜的材料调配出的特调酸奶饮料，并且依照季节推出新款饮料，绝对让你新鲜感不断！全店酸奶饮料使用100%水果调配，食材经严格把关并且适合三大种族饮用。

除了基本款的招牌紫米系列，我们也有牛油果抹茶小帽、芒来芒趣酸奶多、浓浓榴莲酸奶多、蜜瓜酸奶摇和奥利奥酸奶紫米露，各种水果搭配酸奶一起喝，喝多了也没有罪恶感！

snippet.title: Eating Spicy Wings With Minister Dr Maliki Osman | Doing Things With Ministers
snippet.description:
In our next episode of Doing Things With Ministers, we had a chat with Minister Dr Maliki Osman to find out more about the man — from his childhood days, to his very first election, to one of the main things he wants to fight for as a politician.

But of course, John had to ‘spice’ things up a bit and challenged him to take on a plate of fiery chicken wings. Can he handle the heat?

snippet.title: 🤯 LATE COMEBACK DRAMA! | HIGHLIGHTS | Granada 3-5 Barça
snippet.description:
With just two minutes to play, Barça looked to be heading out of the cup when the blaugrana pressure finally paid off, the away side scoring two late goals to take the game into extra time. In the additional 30 minutes, Ronald Koeman's side secured their place in the semi-finals with goals from Griezmann, De Jong and Jordi Alba to seal victory! Check out the highlights!

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong – Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
 
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, “Godzilla vs. Kong,” the next epic adventure in Legendary’s cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in “Godzilla vs. Kong” as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titans—instigated by unseen forces—is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsgård (“Big Little Lies,” “The Little Drummer Girl”), Millie Bobby Brown (“Stranger Things”), Rebecca Hall (“Christine,” “Professor Marston and the Wonder Women”), Brian Tyree Henry (“Joker,” “Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse”), Shun Oguri (“Weathering with You”), Eiza González (“Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw”), Julian Dennison (“Deadpool 2”), with Kyle Chandler (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”) and Demián Bichir (“The Nun,” “The Hateful Eight”).
Wingard (“The Guest,” “You’re Next”) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (“Thor: Ragnarok”) and Max Borenstein (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters,” “Kong: Skull Island”), story by Terry Rossio (“Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales”) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), based on the character “Godzilla” owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The director’s behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (“The Mummy,” “World War Z”), production designers Owen Paterson (“Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,” “Godzilla”) and Thomas S. Hammock (“Blair Witch”), editor Josh Schaeffer (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), costume designer Ann Foley (“Skyscraper”) and visual effects supervisor John “DJ” DesJardin (upcoming “Zack Snyder’s Justice League”).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, “Godzilla vs. Kong.”  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

snippet.title: [EN] 한류스타 성훈 (feat.양희) 과 함께한 데이투 데이투 첫 데이투! 🎶 《제시의 쇼!터뷰》 36화 by 모비딕 Mobidic
snippet.description:
쇼!터뷰를 찾아온 한류스타는 바로 성훈!
성훈의 모든 것을 알아보는 초밀착 인터뷰부터
수영선수 뿜뿜한 폐활량 테스트까지! 🏊‍♂
그리고 이 귀염둥이들 또 뭐야 ㅠㅠ
댕댕이 나만 없어....🐶💕

"거침없는 제시의 기상천외한 솔직담백 인터뷰" 
《제시의 쇼!터뷰》 35화

매주 (목) 오후 6시 30분 
💗모비딕 채널로 놀러오show!💗

#제시의쇼터뷰 #제시 #성훈 #모비딕

0:00 인트로
2:13 키워드 인터뷰
10:24 초밀착 인터뷰
12:39 데이투 인터뷰
18:43 엔딩

영문 번역: 류지연(KAEL RESET)
모비딕 좋아요❤️, 구독🚨, 알림🔔
▶️모비딕 구독하기 https://goo.gl/v2b6rR

※ 본 촬영은 코로나19 바이러스 확산 방지를 위한 체온 측정, 손 소독 등 
개인위생과 공공보건에 유의하여 진행되었습니다. ※.

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.description:
기다리고 기다리던 게스트 현아 등판✨
모르는 것 빼고 다 알려주는 프로필 인터뷰부터

쇼터뷰에서만 볼 수 있는 청문회까지🎤

"거침없는 제시의 기상천외한 솔직담백 인터뷰" 
《제시의 쇼!터뷰》 35화

매주 (목) 오후 6시 30분 
💗모비딕 채널로 놀러오show!💗

#제시의쇼터뷰 #제시 #현아 #모비딕

--------- 뮤지컬 ＜고스트＞ 이벤트 당첨자 공개 --------------------------------------------------
* 2월 2일(화) 19시 30분 회차
1. BC A
2. 진아
3. 고고
4. 조수아
5. 스낵

* 2월 12일(금) 18시 30분 회차
1. Gloria Kim
2. 하응가
3. 정채원
4. 박서연
5. 이채

당첨자는 1월 31일 일요일 밤 12시까지
모비딕 메일 ☞ sbsmobidictv@gmail.com
유튜브 닉네임, 이름, 연락처를 (개인정보 수집에 동의합니다) 라는 문구와 함께 보내주세요.

snippet.title: 【 開開心心最重要 Happy Happy Important】官方4K MV《Danny 常勇 舒森 常樂 培永》
snippet.description:
今年是個非常特殊的一年, 很多不如意的事情 打亂了原先的生活調調.
藉此, 希望透過這首新年歌, 讓大家找回一份最樸素的感覺
而這份感覺 叫做 ——《開開心心最重要》

特別感謝  一同參與的幕後夥伴們👏
還有 每 一 位 喜歡以及支持我們的觀眾朋友❤️

最後最後, 要謝謝最愛最愛的 四個王八
常勇 舒森 常樂 Danny 
如果大家不嫌棄, 而我們沒有翻臉吵架 哈哈哈哈哈
希望未來的每一年 我們一起 繼續玩下去❤️

但願明年不缺席, 也不遲到 😂

--------------------------------
【開開心心最重要】
詞：陳培永       曲：Danny許佳麟

開開心心 最重要
新年一定要熱鬧
歡歡喜喜 最重要
所有壞事 拋拋

整整齊齊 最重要
最愛的人不能少
你啊你啊你 就是你
願你安好

幾個小家伙 想要吃藤條咯
追阿姨的男人 卡車一籮籮
騎紅色摩多 髮型必须灑脫
十公分爆炸頭 手提Radio

你的微笑太美 別讓生活太悲
不怕不畏 喜歡的人要勇敢去追 
One Two Three Go

snippet.title: 沈雁去世享壽60歲 ｢一串心｣成絕響｜華視新聞 20210205
snippet.description:
不少四、五年級生，都曾奉為偶像的沈雁，當年被稱為台灣歌壇第一代玉女掌門人，紅極一時，卻在80年代末期淡出歌壇，遠嫁美國。但今(5)日傳來沈雁在美國去世的消息，享壽60歲。沈雁1979年，畢業於華視第四期演藝訓練班，隨後出道，唱紅了「一串心」等膾炙人口的歌曲，我們為觀眾蒐集了珍貴的畫面，帶您一起回顧，一代玉女的身影。
https://news.cts.com.tw/cts/entertain/202102/202102052030570.html
🔔加Line收快訊 http://bit.ly/CTS_Line
📱用APP滑新聞 http://bit.ly/CTS_APP

snippet.title: Film Theory: How WandaVision Will End And Why It Matters (Marvel)
snippet.description:
Subscribe to never miss a Film Theory! ► http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH      

I am thoroughly impressed with Disney's first Marvel Disney+ show, WandaVision. The old time sitcom comedy mixed with the almost Twilight Zone feel of the mystery is just what I needed to reinvigorate the Marvel Theory side of my brain. Today Loyal Theorists, I am going to PREDICT the end of WandaVision based on all of the cluse so far - plus how I think it will shape the rest of the MCU moving forward. You won't want to miss this!

Get yourself some Theory Wear! ► https://bit.ly/2UkxCv0

snippet.description:
Uppena Telugu Movie Trailer on Mythri Movie Makers. #Uppena Latest 2021 Telugu Movie ft. Panja Vaisshnav Tej, Vijay Sethupathi and Krithi Shetty. Written & Directed by Buchi Babu Sana. Music by DSP / Devi Sri Prasad. Presented by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y Ravi Shankar under Mythri Movie Makers & Sukumar Writings banners.

Uppena Trailer is officially released by Young Tiger NTR.

The tale of an incredible love, Uppena movie is all set for a Grand Release in theaters on February 12th, 2021.

snippet.title: I Spent 100 Hours Customizing The World's Largest PS5 ($70,000)
snippet.description:
I can't believe we spent 100 hours customizing the world's largest Playstation 5 and gave PS5's away to subscribers lol

Hope you enjoyed! Subscribe right now and you'll be a part of the giveaways! Thanks for watching :)

If you're not yet subscribed, I promise you won't regret subscribing! If you're already subscribed, I love you! ❤️
Subscribe and you might be picked to be in my next video! It's free and it would genuinely make me super happy if you subscribed! 🥺

Subscribe to all our channels!
ZHC Crafts: @ZHC Crafts 
ZHC Shorts: @ZHC Shorts 
MsMunchie: @MsMunchie

snippet.title: Kapuso Mo, Jessica Soho: RESULTA NG DNA TEST NG SANGGOL NA NAPALITAN DAW SA ISANG OSPITAL SA RIZAL
snippet.description:
Aired (February 7, 2021): Nitong nakaraang Linggo, itinampok natin ang kaso ng mag-asawang Aphril at Marvin na napagpalit diumano ang kanilang bagong silang na sanggol. Nag-iba raw kasi ang hitsura at ang name tag nito! Si Aphril at ang inuwi nilang sanggol, sumailalim sa DNA test.

Ang resulta ng kanilang DNA test, panoorin sa video!

snippet.title: How Many People Did Nuclear Energy Kill? Nuclear Death Toll
snippet.description:
The first 1000 people to use this link will get a free trial of Skillshare: 
https://skl.sh/kurzgesagtinanutshell01211

Sources & further reading:

snippet.title: Trump leaves office facing mounting debt, devalued assets and scarcity of willing lenders
snippet.description:
One of the consequences of the chaos of the U.S. Capitol is a distancing of banks and other business from former President Trump. He now faces a delicate and difficult situation with his businesses, debt and taxes. Paul Solman reports.

snippet.title: India claim stunning series win, end Australia's Gabba streak | Vodafone Test Series 2020-21
snippet.description:
Rishabh Pant was the hero as an injury-ravaged India ended Australia's 32-year undefeated run at the Gabba, executing a record-breaking final day chase to win the Test by three wickets and the series 2-1.

snippet.title: Lunar New Year's Eve Special 2021
snippet.description:
Get ready to usher in the Year of Ox with Mediacorp artistes through a spectacular “Lou Hei” virtual conferencing session on Live TV!  
LNY Eve’s Special 2021 seeks to break down distance barrier by connecting with local and overseas Singaporeans through technology. Not only will Celebrity Chefs whip up sumptuous festive dishes, iconic TV drama characters will also make their special appearances via AR technology. Audience will stand a chance to win fabulous prizes too!                 

#LNY2021
-----
